sentences.arabic: شَعَرَ خَالِدٌ بِالْمَلَلِ فِي يَوْمِ الْعُطْلَةِ الطَّوِيلِ.
sentences.translation: Halid se osjećao dosadno u dugom danu odmora.
sentences.translationEn: Khalid felt bored on the long holiday day.

sentences.arabic: لَمْ يَكُنْ يَعْرِفُ مَاذَا يَفْعَلُ بِوَقْتِهِ.
sentences.translation: Nije znao šta da radi sa svojim vremenom.
sentences.translationEn: He did not know what to do with his time.

sentences.arabic: قَرَّرَ أَنْ يَقْرَأَ كِتَابًا وَجَدَهُ عَلَى الرَّفِّ.
sentences.translation: Odlučio je da čita knjigu koju je pronašao na polici.
sentences.translationEn: He decided to read a book he found on the shelf.

sentences.arabic: بَعْدَ سَاعَةٍ نَسِيَ الْمَلَلَ وَاسْتَمَرَّ فِي الْقِرَاءَةِ.
sentences.translation: Nakon sat vremena zaboravio je dosadu i nastavio čitati.
sentences.translationEn: After an hour he forgot the boredom and continued reading.
